items.caption_text:
Sundaris, it’s time to take over the dance floor 💃
This season’s biggest wedding song is here ❤️

#OSundari song out now.

#BhoothBanglaBookingOpenNow, get your tickets: Link in bio 

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

@priyadarshan.official @akshaykumar @pareshrawalofficial @rajpalofficial @tabutiful @wamiqagabbi @senguptajisshu @actormanojjoshi #AsraniJi #RajeshSharma 

Music: @ipritamofficial
Singers: @vishalmishraofficial @nakash_aziz & @antaramitraofficial
Lyrics: @kumaarofficial 

Produced by: @balajimotionpictures CapeOfGoodFilms @shobha9168 & @ektarkapoor
Co-produced by: @f.a.a.r.a @vbfilmwala & @vimaldoshi9
Story by: @aakashkaushik25
Screenplay by: @rohanshankar06 @abillash.nair & Priyadarshan
DOP: @divakar.mani
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar

@zeemusiccompany @penmovies

items.caption_text:
An opportunity I hadn’t even imagined for myself 🥺 So grateful to @kalyanipriyadarshan , without whom this idea wouldn’t have been seeded! A girl’s girl 💯 
And Priyan Sir, THANK YOU for the trust! I cannot tell you how priceless being part of your film universe feels! Eternally grateful! ♥️

And to our audiences - so much love on the trailer! Uff! Thank you! Can’t wait for you guys to watch the film ♥️♥️♥️

#BhoothBangla

raw.caption:

And to our audiences - so much love on the trailer! Uff! Thank you! Can’t wait for you guys to watch the film ♥️♥️♥️

#BhoothBangla

items.caption_text:
It’s Vitamin C Day today… and I just found out it does more than I thought.
Good thing I’ve been having Limcee… so my Vitamin C scene is sorted.
What about yours?
#Collab #VitaminC #Immunity #HealthySkin #Limcee

Disclaimer:
Consult your physician for any medical advice. All liabilities are disclaimed.

Reference: 
• 2018;2018:1454936. Published 2018 Aug 2.
• Nutrients. 2017 Nov 3;9(11):1211. doi: 10.3390/nu9111211. PMID: 29099763;
PMCID:PMC5707683
• International Journal of Cosmetics and Dermatology, 1(1), 12-20.
https://doi.org/10.55124/ijcd.v1i1.44
• Front Physiol. 2018 Jul 4;9:819.

items.caption_text:
Sometimes a melodious voice enchants not just one, but many generations.

To timeless songs you can’t skip, songs that make your heart skip a beat.

Watch the iconic Shreya Ghoshal pay a heartfelt homage to the legendary Bharat Ratna Lata Mangeshkar, the Nightingale of India, with *Letters to Lata Didi!*💌

Travel down memory lane with Kotak Solitaire’s exclusive experience. 

✨ Pre-sale access, for best seats on priority. 

✨ Dedicated express entry with zero waiting. 

✨ Exclusive Meet & Greet with your favourite icon. 

✨ Curated hospitality, with complimentary food and beverages.

Make it a night that’s truly unforgettable.

#Ad #KotakSolitaire #LettersToLataDidi #LataMangeshkarLegacy #UnforgettableLegacy
